policy.summary: Keep 2025-09-03 as the default request header and require explicit opt-in for newer additive version seams.

known_seams.compatibility_notes: Ordering hints under position are newer-version concepts. Keep notion_version explicit when using append ordering beyond the baseline header.
Page creation ordering hints are opt-in newer semantics and should be paired with an explicit newer Notion-Version header.
Modern trash-state fields are available in the committed surface, but callers should treat them as newer additive response data.
known_seams.surface: Modern page, block, database, data source, and file upload responses

known_seams.compatibility_notes: Meeting notes is the newer name for the transcription block response family and should be treated as an opt-in newer concept.
The databases namespace remains in the SDK as compatibility surface, but new work should prefer the data source APIs under the 2025-09-03 baseline.
